focus_items.title: Check latest redeem codes first
focus_items.detail: Codes expire fast and are one of the most valuable low-effort wins for daily visitors.

focus_items.title: Save gems for hero-focused events
focus_items.detail: Hall of Heroes and Hero Roulette style windows are where disciplined players create the most value.

focus_items.title: Push only the next meaningful building chain
focus_items.detail: Do not scatter upgrades. Build toward your next real unlock or event breakpoint.

practical_notes: Keep code-board status honest: confirmed live, retest first, or stale tracker residue.

Use one memo line for furnace target, event plan, and alliance reminder.
